metadata.description: Single Source of Truth (SSOT) for merchant profiling data.Contains comprehensive merchant business details, transaction patterns, EDC/QRIS ownership.consolidated repository for all merchant profiling data across BukuWarung's sales (MSE/ RSE/ MSEE).

creation_query.query:
-- Version Control
-- (2025-04-25) --> Erald created this query.
-- (2025-06-09) --> Erald change the logic for Dispatched and Delivered for each machine.
-- (2025-06-10) --> Erald add the "send_to_vendor_date", "finished_print_date" and lat-long related (KYB and Any)
-- (2025-06-17) --> Erald improve duplication problem caused by "send_to_vendor_date" and "finished_print_date"
-- (2025-06-18) --> Erald added multiple flag related to Nobu registration, until activation part. Flag like "order_send_to_nobu_flag", "order_qris_has_final_answer_flag", and "order_has_transacted_more_than_1_flag"
-- (2025-06-24) --> Erald added multiple column to capture SLA duration between each process. Already take into account work days using "NetWorkDays" function
-- (2025-06-25) --> Erald added SLA calculation and measure whether it passed or not.
-- (2025-07-14) --> Erald added "activation_tpv_15k_date" and "sla_status_activated_vs_delivered" column to check when each merchant passed TPV 15K.
-- (2025

columns.description: phonenumber. Phone number (10-11 digit Indonesian mobile). Primary identifier for merchant ac
createdat. Timestamp when record was created. Indicates when entity entered the system.
Source system identifier (Zoho/CRM). Data origin flag indicating which system created record.
updatedat. Updated at. Timestamp of last modification. Tracks when data was last changed.
businessname. Official registered business name or trading name. Primary identifier for mercha
ownername. Name of business owner or authorized representative. Used for KYC identity verif
yearofbirth. Year of birth of merchant owner. Used for KYC demographic verification and age v
Full merchant business address including street, city, province. Used for location-based services and delivery verification.
example_values: Jalan Cikalong, DUSUN 1, Mandalamukti, Bandung Barat, Jawa, 40115, Indonesia
Bumi Waringin Indah 1, Karangsambung, Kab Bekasi, Jawa Barat, Jawa, 17540, Indonesia
Cinunuk, Cileunyi, Kabupaten Bandung, Jawa Barat, Jawa, 40626, Indonesia

columns.description: yearfounded. Year the merchant's business was established. Used for business maturity assessm
shoppic. Person in charge at merchant shop. Contact for shop operations.
numberofbranches. Number of business branches merchant operates. Business scale indicator.
numberofemployees. Number of employees in merchant's business. Business size metric.
surroundingarea. Description of area surrounding merchant location. Context for business environm
roadlocationtype. Type of road location (main road, side road, alley, etc). Used to classify merch
estimatedcustomersperday. Estimated number of customers visiting merchant per day. Indicator of business t
totaldailytransactions. Total number of transactions merchant processes daily. Measure of daily transact
cardtransactions. Count of card/debit card transactions processed. Card payment volume.
noncardtransactions. Count of non-card transactions (cash, transfer). Alternative payment volume.
bricardtransactions. Count of BRI card/debit card transactions. BRI product transaction volume.
ppobtransactions. Count of PPOB (bill payment) transactions. Bill payment volume.
banktransferapps. List of bank transfer apps merchant uses. Payment channel adoption.
ppobapps. List of PPOB apps/services merchant uses. Bill payment channel adoption.
lakupandaicertificate. Boolean flag indicating Laku Pandai financial certification. Compliance indicato
userid. External user ID from CRM system. System cross-reference.
businesstypes. Array of business type categories merchant operates (FMCG, FnB, retail, etc). Mu
completedloandate. Date when merchant's loan application process was fully completed and approved.
edcownership. Status of EDC machine ownership (owned/not owned). Product ownership indicator.
loanname. Name identifier. Used for display, lookup, and account tracking.
loanownership. Status of loan ownership and type. Loan product indicator.
ownedloanlimit. Loan limit amount (Rp) for merchant's loan. Credit limit.
retaileventpiccontact. Contact person for retail event. Event coordinator.
retailtypepoi. Type of point of interest for retail. Location classification.
retailcommunityname. Name of retail community or association merchant belongs to. Community group ide
retailcommunityaffiliation. Community affiliation status. Group membership.
retailqrisownership. List of QRIS payment ownership details. Payment method adoption.
retailcreditcardpcttransaction. Percentage of transactions via credit card. Payment mix metric.
Percentage of retail transactions via QRIS payment method. Retail QRIS percentage of transaction volume.
retailcontactpicpoi. Contact person at point of interest. POI contact.
retaildebitcardpcttransaction. Percentage of transactions via debit card. Payment mix metric.
retailnamepicpoi. Name of person in charge at POI. POI contact name.
retailposownership. List of POS system ownership details. Payment terminal adoption.
retailestablishmenttype. Type of retail establishment (convenience store, supermarket, market stall, etc)
retaillocatedinevent. Whether retail located in special event venue. Event venue indicator.
retaillocatedinpoi. Whether retail located at point of interest. POI location indicator.
retaileventpicname. Full name of person in charge (PIC) managing retail events/activities. Event coo
retailedcownership. List of EDC machines merchant owns. Device ownership.
retailofflinedailytransaction. Average daily offline transaction count. Offline activity volume.
retailonlinedailytransaction. Average daily online transaction count. Online activity volume.
retaildailyqrisvolume. Average daily QRIS transaction volume. Payment volume.
Retail point of interest name. Retail name at specific POI location for store identification.
Retail merchant flag indicator. Binary indicator (0/1) marking whether merchant is retail category.
Assessment notes from credit evaluation team. Contains qualitative observations on borrower and business.
storetype. Category or type classification. Used for segmentation and grouping.
Businessindustry. Business industry classification (FMCG, FnB, payment_agent). Sector categorization.
Businesslocation. Business location type (residential, commercial, office, etc). Area classification.
Interestedinloan. Indicator if merchant is interested in loan products (yes/no). Product interest.
Desiredloanlimit. Loan amount merchant would like to apply for (Rp). Borrowing intent.
Whether MEE interested in selling other BukuWarung products. Sales opportunity indicator.
Average daily profit from payment agent services. Income metric.
Whether merchant interested in building other business lines. Growth intention.
Mee Total - Sum total of values. Aggregated financial or volume metric.
Reason merchant not using BW for BRI OnUs transfers. Objection reason.
Whether merchant owns EDC machine and which brand. Product ownership.
Reason merchant not using BW for non-BRI EDC. Objection reason.
Type of loan merchant currently has. Product ownership.
Average daily sales/omset from payment agent business. Revenue metric.
Merchant motivation to switch from BRI OnUs to BukuWarung. Switch motivation.
Current loan term/tenor in months. Product term.
Average daily profit from non-agent businesses. Income metric.
Mee current loan type. Category or type classification. Used for segmentation and grouping.
Average daily revenue from non-agent business. Revenue metric.
Interest rate of current loan (%). Pricing information.
Reason merchant not using full BukuWarung products. Adoption barrier.
Motivation to switch all non-BRI EDC to BukuWarung. Product switching intent.
Due date/expiry of KUR loan. Loan maturity.
Reason merchant not interested in BukuWarung loan. Objection reason.
Bank providing KUR loan. Competitor information.
Loan limit of KUR loan (Rp). Competitor product info.
Intended use/purpose of BukuWarung loan. Loan objective.
firstvisitbiztype. Business type of merchant at first visit/encounter. Initial business classificat
latestvisitdate. Date of most recent visit to merchant by sales team. Latest engagement timestamp
createddate. Date when merchant record was first created in system. Record creation date.
hasbriedc. Has b r i e d c. Flag (1/0) indicating merchant currently owns/operates BRI EDC
hasbniedc. Has b n i e d c. Boolean flag indicating possession of product/service. Used for
hasmandiriedc. Has mandiri e d c. Boolean flag indicating possession of product/service. Used f
Name of current MSE Head of Region managing this merchant. Organizational assignment.
Name of current MSE Head of Area managing this merchant. Organizational assignment.
Name of current MSE Team Lead managing this merchant. Direct manager assignment.
SUPREME tier classification status. Premium merchant tier indicator.
Supreme date of transaction or event. Most recent supreme transaction date in record history.
hasandroidedc. Has android e d c. Boolean flag indicating possession of product/service. Used f
Total count of Android EDC machines. Total android machine count for retail locations.
hassakuedc. Has saku e d c. Boolean flag indicating possession of product/service. Used for
Total count of Saku EDC machines. Total saku machine count deployed to merchant.
Merchant profile ID from Prospero CRM. External system reference identifier.
Latitude of merchant's most recent location. Latest geographic coordinate.
Longitude of merchant's most recent location. Latest geographic coordinate.
Days user has been active at geographic coordinate location. User location tenure.

columns.description: Gsheet Ssot - URL to Google Sheets single source of truth. Master documentation reference.
National ID number (NIK) of merchant owner. Personal identifier.
